name: BRINKS CO
summary: PART I Overview The Brinks Company is a leading global provider of cash and valuables management, digital retail solutions, and ATM managed services. Our customers include financial institutions, retailers, government agencies, mints, jewelers and other commercial operations around the world.Our global network serves customers in more than 100 countries. We have controlling ownership interests in companies in 51 countries and agency relationships with companies in additional countries.We employ ...
